summary: Created cite-extract.sh with 8 citation pattern families, JSON/pretty output, confidence filtering, deduplication, and stdin/file input

artifacts.summary: Citation extraction script with 8 pattern families (author_year, parenthetical, phrase_attribution, theorem_attr_bracket, theorem_attr_ref, direct_quote_bracket, direct_quote_dash, numeric_bracket, alpha_num_bracket, latex_cite), JSON/pretty output, --min-confidence filtering, deduplication by (line_number, source_text), stdin and file path input
